The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Rhodosticta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Rhodosticta is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
